name: Epsilon The Magnet Warrior
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>磁石の戦士ε</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マグネット・ウォリアー・イプシロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior"; this card's name becomes the sent monster's name (until the End Phase), then you can Special Summon 1 "Magnet Warrior" or "Magna Warrior" monster from your GY with a different name than the cards you control. You can only use this effect of "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior"; this card's name becomes the sent monster's name (until the End Phase), then you can Special Summon 1 "Magnet Warrior" or "Magna Warrior" monster from your GY with a different name than the cards you control. You can only use this effect of "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior"; this card's name becomes the sent monster's name (until the End Phase), then you can Special Summon 1 "Magnet Warrior" or "Magna Warrior" monster from your GY with a different name than the cards you control. You can only use this effect of "Epsilon The Magnet Warrior" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
